name: obsidian-context-mcp
description: Local MCP server connecting Cursor projects to Obsidian documentation

scripts.mcp:start: cd python && python -m uv run obsidian-context-mcp server
scripts.python:test: cd python && python -m uv run pytest tests/ -v
scripts.python:lint: cd python && python -m uv run ruff check src tests
scripts.python:typecheck: cd python && python -m uv run mypy src
